text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
choice_data_list:
...You don't look too happy for someone who
just won a race.

...You don't look too happy for someone who
just won a race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
choice_data_list:
...You don't look too happy for someone who
just won a race.

...You don't look too happy for someone who
just won a race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Yeah. Let's go all out and make some
noise..

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wh-why do I needa relax? I won, so why do I feel
so tense?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Trainer. The party's gonna have to wait.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'll be ready to celebrate in no time.
No way I'm gonna stay a party pooper forever.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Next time, I'll be ready. For sure...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross vows that one day she'll be able to
celebrate her victory with all her heart. All I can
do is believe that day will come.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, haha. Ya hit the nail right on the head!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Right now, I'm way more relieved that the race is
over than I am excited I won.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But... how come? I should be rarin' to go! Ready
to tackle my next race head-on!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I can't be satisfied with just reachin' the end! I
know the races up ahead are only gonna get more
intense, so what gives?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Confronted with her unexpected reaction to
victory, Tamamo Cross experiences a mix of
sadness and anger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her shoulders trembling, Tamamo Cross and
I have no choice but to channel this energy into
our preparations for the next race.
